series_metadata.series_description: File contains Ohio Fire Academy Course Curriculum including the Instructor Lesson Plan and Student Manual.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy in operating area converted machine readable format. Upon confirmation machine readable records have been checked quality and completeness, paper copy. ; Microform: seven years ; Electronic: Maintain electronic data fifty years
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Shred
